overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} \text {if } I_{0} (\mathbf {R}) <   I_{1} (\mathbf {R}) \text { and } I_{2} (\mathbf {R})\text {, choose } H_{0}\text{,} \\ \text {if } I_{1} (\mathbf {R}) <   I_{0} (\mathbf {R}) \text { and } I_{2} (\mathbf {R})\text {, choose } H_{1}\text{,} \\ \text {if } I_{2} (\mathbf {R}) <   I_{0} (\mathbf {R}) \text { and } I_{1} (\mathbf {R})\text {, choose } H_{2}\text{.} \end{array}\tag{101}
